{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Horizon's chamber
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] rested in a specific chamber that the [[Captain]] was able to open and awaken her.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
